mapper.insert: insert into sys_data_change_log (entity_name, entity_id, field_name, old_value, new_value, change_type, operate_by, operate_time, remark) values (#{entityName}, #{entityId}, #{fieldName}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue}, #{changeType}, #{operateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})

insert into sys_data_change_log (entity_name, entity_id, field_name, old_value, new_value, change_type, operate_by, operate_time, remark) values
(#{item.entityName}, #{item.entityId}, #{item.fieldName}, #{item.oldValue}, #{item.newValue}, #{item.changeType}, #{item.operateBy}, sysdate(), #{item.remark})
mapper.select: select id, entity_name, entity_id, field_name, old_value, new_value, change_type, operate_by, operate_time, remark from sys_data_change_log where entity_name = #{entityName} and entity_id = #{entityId} order by operate_time desc
